note: EN 15804+A2 table reports Climate Change (total) = 6.03E+00, Climate Change (fossil) = 6.39E+00, Climate Change (biogenic) = -3.84E-01 for A1/A2/A3 combined column. There is also a land use change component (2.34E-02). GWP-GHG (excl biogenic) not separately labelled; the 'Climate Change' total value (6.03) is taken as gwp_total and reported as gwp_ghg as well.
